name: io.github.NonFungibleH/vestream
description: Real-time token vesting data for AI agents. Query wallet vestings, upcoming token unlocks, and individual stream details across Sablier, UNCX, Hedgey, Unvest, and Team Finance on Ethereum, Base, and BSC.
